Convert genomic (seqname, position) pairs to virtual positions

Source: R/coord_ops.R
dot-virtualize_positions.Rd

Uses the map returned by .build_virtual_map(). Each position is resolved against the window whose seqname matches and whose genomic range contains the position. Positions that match no window get NA_real_.

Usage

.virtualize_positions(seqnames, positions, vmap)

Arguments

seqnames

Character vector of seqnames.

positions

Numeric vector of genomic positions, same length.

vmap

A virtualization map.

Value

Numeric vector of virtual positions, NA for unmatched.
